nasb.text: Furthermore, anything that the unclean person touches shall be unclean; and the person who touches it shall be unclean until evening.’ ”

esv.text: And whatever the unclean person touches shall be unclean, and anyone who touches it shall be unclean until evening.”

cnv.text: 不潔淨的人摸過的一切，必不潔淨；摸了這物的人，也必不潔淨到晚上。”

ccb.text: 不洁净的人碰过的东西都不洁净，碰过这些东西的人傍晚之前都不洁净。”
